zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen於1249年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內時，他的父親Guy de Dampierre24歲，母親Mathilde de Béthune20歲。他於1272年與Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年9月25日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫易也享年73歲，埋葬在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫易也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen于1249年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內时，他的父亲Guy de Dampierre24岁，母亲Mathilde de Béthune20岁。他于1272年与Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1322年9月25日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫易也享年73岁，埋葬在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫易也。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béthune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen was born in 1249, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Guy de Dampierre, was 24 and his mother, Mathilde de Béthune, was 20. He married Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers in 1272. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 September 1322, in Ieper, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 73, and was buried in Ieper, West Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen est né en 1249, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Guy de Dampierre, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Béthune, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers en 1272. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1322, à Ieper, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Ieper, Flandre occidentale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen 1249 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Dampierre 24 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Béthune 20. Er hat 1272 Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. September 1322 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Ieper, West-Flandern, Belgien und wurde in Ieper, West-Flandern, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen è nato il nel 1249 nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Guy de Dampierre, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Béthune, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers nel 1272. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 settembre 1322, nel Ieper, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Ieper, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderenが1249年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで生まれた時，父Guy de Dampierreは24歳，母Mathilde de Béthuneは20歳であった。1272年にYolande de Bourgogne II of Neversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年9月25日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンイエペルで73歳で死去し，ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンイエペルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen(이)가 1249년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Dampierre(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Béthune(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1272년 Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 9월 25일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 이퍼에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 이퍼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen nasceu em 1249, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Guy de Dampierre, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Béthune, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers em 1272. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1322, em Ieper, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Ieper, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen родился в 1249 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy de Dampierre было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Béthune, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers в 1272 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 сентября 1322 г. в местности иепир, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности иепир, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen nació en 1249, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Guy de Dampierre, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Béthune, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers en 1272. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1322, en Ieper, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Ieper, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica.
